'''''Drago''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After some Rebel pilots, including [[Samuel Raider]] and [[Toalagar]], escaped from [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]] prison aboard the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Genue]]'', the ''Drago'' was sent to retrieve them near [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Cardacs]], flying in [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] held off [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] launched from the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']] while the ''Drago'' conducted a boarding operation and escaped with the rescued pilots.

==Appearances==
